privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world emails drawn randomly from the SpamAssassin public corpus. The expected target email address 'devrel@project.org' and the required maildir folders 'Community-Replies' and 'New-Topics' perfectly match the explicit task description instructions and the scoring logic in verifier.py and export_result.sh.
